wordplay_note: Chuck's wife and a psychiatric social worker
card_description: Mary Rittersdorf is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Clans of the Alphane Moon*. Psychiatric professional who wants to re-institutionalize the Alphane Moon colonists. Name note: Chuck's wife and a psychiatric social worker. Professional authority as personal cruelty — she pathologizes everything. First appears in *Clans of the Alphane Moon*.

reference.brief: Psychiatric professional who wants to re-institutionalize the Alphane Moon colonists
reference.significance: Professional authority as personal cruelty — she pathologizes everything
